name: Catan
description: Trade, build, and settle the island of Catan. Collect and manage resources to expand your settlements and cities, racing rivals to ten victory points.

name: Ticket to Ride
description: Collect train cards to claim railway routes connecting cities across the map, completing destination tickets for the longest continuous routes.

name: Pandemic
description: Work together as a team of specialists to treat infections and discover cures before four deadly diseases overwhelm the world.

name: Carcassonne
description: Draw and place tiles to build a medieval landscape of cities, roads, and fields, deploying followers to score the features you complete.

name: Azul
description: Draft colorful tiles to decorate the walls of the Royal Palace of Evora, planning placements to maximize points and deny your opponents.
